title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MAHINOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY HUBANGON, MUNICIPALITY OF MAHINOG, PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN TO SIXTO A. ABAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 4008; 112 OG No. 16, 2429 (April 18, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10750, March 07, 2016 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MAHINOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY HUBANGON, MUNICIPALITY OF MAHINOG, PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN TO SIXTO A. ABAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School.

â The name of Mahinog National High School in Barangay Hubangon, Municipality of Mahinog, Province of Camiguin is hereby changed to Sixto A. Abao National High School.

SEC 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Sixto A. Abao National High School shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Hubangon, Municipality of Mahinog, Province of Camiguin.

SEC. 3.

Provision of Marker.

â The Department of EducationâDivision of Camiguin, in coordination with the local government unit of the Municipality of Mahinog, shall provide appropriate memorials or markers in both the Sixto A. Abao National High School and the Mahinog National High School, which shall indicate the history of the establishment of both schools and how they acquired their respective names.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 10, 2014 and December 7, 2015, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

MAR 07 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
